activated_rules.rule_name: Letter of Credit (LC) exception not activated
General goods description with invoice reference

consignor.certificate_value:
SKF Sverige AB
Kvibergs Broväg 8
SE-415 05, GÖTEBORG
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
SKF Sverige AB
von Utfallsgatan 4
415 50 Göteborg
Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'SKF Sverige AB' from certificate matches invoice issuer 'SKF Sverige AB' after allowed normalization. Addresses differ in street but this is allowed. Country Sweden matches exactly after normalization. Rule 4.1.0 confirms consignor is explicitly identifiable in invoice including all parts of the document.

consignee.certificate_value:
SKF Vietnam CO Ltd
105 Ton Dat Tien, Tan Phu Ward
700000 Ho Chi Minh
Viet Nam
consignee.invoice_value:
SKF Vietnam CO Ltd
R2, F4 Crescent Plaza Bldg, 105 Ton Dat Tien Street, Tan My Ward
Ho Chi Minh 700000
Vietnam
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'SKF Vietnam CO Ltd' matches invoice 'Bill to' and 'Sold to' party exactly after normalization. Address details vary but name and country Vietnam are consistent. Priority applied to 'Bill to' field in invoice. Land matches exactly (Vietnam).

goods_description.certificate_value:
1 COLLIE, 1 PCS SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG
SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG
goods_description.motivation: Goods description in certificate 'SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG' is exactly identifiable in invoice product description. Article number 'SEG-25D-374856' from certificate referenced in certificate and partially appears in supporting material, but general goods description with explicit invoice reference clause (4.3.5) was applied, verifying associated invoice 9310094119. No semantic interpretation needed.

quantity.motivation: Quantity in certificate is '1 pcs' and in invoice the quantity is '1' in the declared sections. Unit normalization and occurrence check confirm match. Weight also matches as 286,000 KG net weight in certificate and invoice. No conflicting or missing data.

origin.invoice_value:
Sweden
European Union
Preferential origin: Yes
origin.motivation: Origin in certificate states 'SWEDEN' which exactly matches the invoice's origin declarations including 'Sweden', 'European Union' and 'Preferential origin: Yes'. EU origin normalization applied ensuring equivalence. No mismatch or contradiction.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All control points matched explicitly through allowed normalizations and verifications. No mismatches or uncertainties detected. Document pair can be auto-approved.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla uppgifter i certifikatet överensstämmer exakt med fakturan. Certifikatets avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland är bekräftade i fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
